description: Uptrace is an open-source observability platform built on OpenTelemetry for distributed tracing, metrics, logs, dashboards, and alerting. It is available as a cloud service and as a self-hosted deployment.
summary: Uptrace exposes a documented JSON HTTP API at `https://api.uptrace.dev/` and a built-in MCP server at `https://<your-uptrace-host>/mcp/<project_id>`, both authenticated with a user API token sent as `Authorization: Bearer …`.
